title: roegneria canina subsp. hispanica
intro: Roegneria canina subsp. hispanica is a plant species that is also known as Spanish bentgrass, and it belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Roegneria canina subsp. hispanica has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, allowing for the extraction of its active compounds and utilization in herbal remedies.
